buildList.buildDescription: The relatively most optimal build to wreck havoc

modules.moduleDescription: HARPOON: Successfully harpooning a target instantly resets Harpoon cooldown. Applies 1 stack of Fragile per second while the harpoon is attached to an enemy, up to 5 stacks. Harpoon Range +15%, Harpoon Speed Boost +5%, Harpoon Energy Cost +10%

COMBAT CAGE Grants 1 stack of Warded for every enemy vehicle caught within Scrap Barricade, up to 5 stacks. Damage dealt to one enemy vehicle in Combat Cage is applied as true damage to all other vehicles within it. Toggling the ability off resets all effects. Combat Cage Radius +20%, Combat Cage Cooldown +20%, Combat Cage Duration-20%
AP LOADOUT: Replaces the vehicle's original shells with AP shells that apply 300 Fire status. AP Penetration (Max) +15.1%, Magazine Restock Time +5%
Grants full resistance to Grease. Hull Traverse +9.5%, Track HP -5%

equipments.equipmentDescription: Instantly restores HP and shields. Restores 550 HP instantly. Triggers shield recovery on activation. Taking damage interrupts the repair process. Cooldown: 45s. Charges: 3. Charge cooldown: 15s.
Temporarily grants the vehicle extra HP that depletes over time. Grants 700 temporary HP on activation. After 1s, temporary HP starts to deplete at 25 HP/s. Cooldown: 105s

perks.perkDescription: +10 to Boost Energy capacity and +5% to Boost Energy regeneration speed for every collected Scrap Token until destruction.
